task_completion.description: Verify that the Purchase Agreements feature is enabled in Odoo settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Odoo Settings under the Purchase section, the checkbox for 'Purchase Agreements' should be checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Blanket Order for the correct vendor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Purchase Agreement form is visible with the 'Agreement Type' set to 'Blanket Order' and the 'Vendor' field set to 'SoundWave Solutions Inc.'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct product, quantity, and price are set on the Blanket Order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the agreement lines of the Blanket Order, there is a line for 'Acoustic Isolation Panel' with a quantity of 1000 and a unit price of $42.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the Blanket Order has been confirmed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status indicator in the top right of the Purchase Agreement form shows 'Confirmed' or 'Ongoing' instead of 'Draft'.

task_completion.description: Verify a linked purchase order (call-off) is created for the correct quantity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Request for Quotation (RFQ) or Purchase Order form is visible, linked to the Blanket Order, with a product line for 'Acoustic Isolation Panel' showing a quantity of exactly 50.

task_completion.description: Verify the call-off purchase order is confirmed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status indicator on the linked Purchase Order shows 'Purchase Order' (or 'Locked'), indicating it has been confirmed from an RFQ.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Odoo web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the standard Odoo web interface (menus, navigation bars, form views) in a web browser, not terminal outputs or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the page content was not manipulated using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Fonts, alignments, and UI elements should look consistent with standard Odoo styling. There should be no floating text or misaligned fields.

integrity.description: Ensure records appear to be genuinely created in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The breadcrumbs or record headers should show standard Odoo sequence numbers (e.g., 'TE000...', 'P000...') rather than generic placeholders.
